visa_types.overview:
Overview
Spouse of Latvian nationals visiting family and friends visa is for short stay visits only. This category of visa caters for applicants wishing to visit his/her spouse of Latvian national.
                                                                        Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Please note that; spouses of Latvian nationals travelling to Latvia are not exempt from the visa fee.
                                                                        They are subject to pay the regular visa fee mentioned in “Visa Fees” tab on this website.
Jurisdiction to apply for Latvian visa
There are no restrictions on the Latvian visas jurisdiction. Prospective applicants are free to apply for Latvian visas from any of the Visa Application centres across Turkey and collect
                                                                        processed passports from the same.
In addition, all applicants, including applicants under the age of 6 and/or applicants with VIS, must come to the office.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Spouse of Latvian nationals visiting family and friends visa is for short stay visits only. This category of visa caters for applicants wishing to visit his/her spouse of Latvian national.
                                                                        Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. Please note that; spouses of Latvian nationals travelling to Latvia are not exempt from the visa fee.
                                                                        They are subject to pay the regular visa fee mentioned in “Visa Fees” tab on this website.
Jurisdiction to apply for Latvian visa
There are no restrictions on the Latvian visas jurisdiction. Prospective applicants are free to apply for Latvian visas from any of the Visa Application centres across Turkey and collect
                                                                        processed passports from the same.
In addition, all applicants, including applicants under the age of 6 and/or applicants with VIS, must come to the office.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business]
                                                                       
Visa application fee for citizens of the countries with which the European Union has concluded agreements on the facilitation of the issuance of visas:
For nationals of Ukraine – the standard processing fee for a visa application (within 10 calendar days) – 35 EUR;
For nationals of Ukraine – express processing service for an urgent visa application (within 3 days) – 70 EUR;
For nationals of Albania, Armenia, Azerbaijan, Belarus, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Georgia, Serbia, Montenegro, North Macedonia, and Moldova – for standard processing of a visa application – 35 EUR.
The following persons are exempt from paying a fee for a short-stay visa:
- children under the age of six;
- pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who are visiting for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchers, as defined in point, (2) of Article 3 of Directive (EU) 2016/801 of the European Parliament and of the Council, travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research or participating in a scientific seminar or conference;
- representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations.
The following categories are exempt from paying a fee for a long-stay visa:
- children under the age of 12.
Attention Please : 
- In addition to the visa fee, a 25.50 Euro service fee shall be charged for each application if no biometric data has been submitted prior to the current application, and a 24.5 Euro fee
                                                                            if the applicant has submitted his/her biometric data to while applying for a Schengen visa earlier
- All payments are accepted only in Euro - and in cash.
- All payments are non-refundable.
- Courier is an optional service which will be charged 17 Euro.
- Credit Card is not valid for the payments.

## Documents Required
Dear Applicant;
Please click for the required documents.
If you are a citizen of a countries listed on the link (https://likumi.lv/ta/en/en/id/212364-regulation-regarding-the-countries-for-the-citizens-of-which-an-additional-assessment-shall-be-performed-when-issuing-a-visa-or-a-residence-permit), please complete the form below.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be sized between 35 – 45 mm
- Full face taken straight forward 30 mm from point of the chin to top of hair
- Taken against a white background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
For further details with samples click here. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1ZBP54ggyfAp2nOttEpwG5/0011d8b0ccc68d239c7405562ac0d395/photo_specifications.pdf)
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission
                                                                        Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
C type (Schengen) visa applications shall be lodged no more than six months, and for seafarers in the performance of their duties no more than nine months, before the start of the intended visit, ad, as a rule, no later than 15 calendar days before the start of intended visit.
Applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days after their arrival at the Embassy. That period may be extended up to 45 calendar days in individual cases, when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
Under Regulation No 554 of the Cabinet of Ministers of the Republic of Latvia "Regulations Regarding the States for the Citizens of which in issuing a Visa or Residence Permit an Additional Examination shall be performed", nationals of these states/ territories are subjects of additional consultations
 We advise to submit the application well in advance.
Third countries for the nationals of which prior consultations or notification is required Under Regulation No 554 of the Cabinet of Ministers of the Republic of Latvia "Regulations Regarding the States for the Citizens of which in issuing a Visa or Residence Permit an Additional Examination shall be performed", nationals of these states/ territories are subjects of additional consultations:
- Islamic Republic of Afghanistan
- People's Democratic Republic of Algeria
- Republic of Belarus

- Republic of Tajikistan
- Republic of Tunisia
- Ukraine (Autonomous Republic of Crimea, Luhansk region and Donetsk region)*
Applicable to a person whose address of the place of residence or place of 
birth is in the indicated territory.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Foreigners who need to stay in Latvia more than 90 days in 180-day period depending on the circumstances should apply for a long-stay visa (or a residence permit).
Starting with January , 2019, the procedure for submitting long stay visa applications in Turkey has been changed.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Business]
                                                                       
Visa application fee for citizens of the countries with which the European Union has concluded agreements on the facilitation of the issuance of visas:
For nationals of Ukraine – the standard processing fee for a visa application (within 10 calendar days) – 35 EUR;
For nationals of Ukraine – express processing service for an urgent visa application (within 3 days) – 70 EUR;
For nationals of Albania, Armenia, Azerbaijan, Belarus, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Georgia, Serbia, Montenegro, North Macedonia, and Moldova – for standard processing of a visa application – 35 EUR.
The following persons are exempt from paying a fee for a short-stay visa:
- children under the age of six;
- pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who are visiting for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchers, as defined in point, (2) of Article 3 of Directive (EU) 2016/801 of the European Parliament and of the Council, travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research or participating in a scientific seminar or conference;
- representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations.
The following categories are exempt from paying a fee for a long-stay visa:
- children under the age of 12.
Attention Please :
- Except from visa fee, there will be 25.50 Euro service fee charged for each applications.
- All payments are accepted only in Euro and in cash.
- All payments are non-refundable.
- Courier is an optional service which will be charged 17 Euro.
- Credit Card is not valid for the payments.
- Please note: In Visa Application Centres payments with 500 Euro banknotes are not accepted.

## Documents Required
In order to travel to Latvia in the framework of an exchange program, Turkish nationals are required to lodge an application for a long stay visa (Type - D).
Dear Applicant;
Please click for the required documents.
If you are a citizen of a countries listed on the link (https://likumi.lv/ta/en/en/id/212364-regulation-regarding-the-countries-for-the-citizens-of-which-an-additional-assessment-shall-be-performed-when-issuing-a-visa-or-a-residence-permit), please complete the form below.

## Photo Specifications
A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:
- Must be an up-to-date photograph (dated max 6 month old)
- Must be a color photograph printed on normal photographic paper
- Should be sized between 35 – 45 mm
- Full face taken straight forward 30 mm from point of the chin to top of hair
- Taken against a white background
- Without sunglasses
- Without hat or other head covering unless you wear this for religious reasons
- Spectacles should not have toned or reflecting glasses
- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes
For further details with samples click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1ZBP54ggyfAp2nOttEpwG5/0011d8b0ccc68d239c7405562ac0d395/photo_specifications.pdf).
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission
                                                                        Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
C type (Schengen) visa applications shall be lodged no more than six months, and for seafarers in the performance of their duties no more than nine months, before the start of the intended visit, ad, as a rule, no later than 15 calendar days before the start of intended visit.
Applications shall be decided on within 15 calendar days after their arrival at the Embassy. That period may be extended up to 45 calendar days in individual cases, when further scrutiny of the application is needed.
Under Regulation No 554 of the Cabinet of Ministers of the Republic of Latvia "Regulations Regarding the States for the Citizens of which in issuing a Visa or Residence Permit an Additional Examination shall be performed", nationals of these states/ territories are subjects of additional consultations
 We advise to submit the application well in advance.
Third countries for the nationals of which prior consultations or notification is required Under Regulation No 554 of the Cabinet of Ministers of the Republic of Latvia "Regulations Regarding the States for the Citizens of which in issuing a Visa or Residence Permit an Additional Examination shall be performed", nationals of these states/ territories are subjects of additional consultations:

visa_types.name: Short Stay Visa
visa_types.overview:
A visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Latvia for a limited period of time. The short stay C visas can be submitted to Visa Application Centres in Ankara, İstanbul (Harbiye),
                                                            İstanbul (Altunizade), İzmir, Bursa, Gaziantep, Edirne, İzmir, Antalya and Trabzon.
VFS Global employees can provide you with information and application forms for Latvian visas, but they are not able to provide you with advice regarding which visa you should apply for. 
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category. 
Please click on each of the above tab for detail information.
SHORT STAY (C TYPE VISA) – only residents of Turkey
NATIONAL/LONG STAY (D TYPE VISA) – residents of Turkey, Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Iraq, Iran, Kosovo, North-Macedonia, Serbia, Syria
The short-term or Schengen visa application can be submitted 6 months before the planned travel.
The long-term of National visa application can be submitted 3 months before the planned travel.

Dear Applicant;

A Photograph submitted with the application for a visa should comply with the following specifications:

- The frame of the spectacles may not cover the eyes

Overview
Sports and Cultural category visa is only intended to allow a foreign national to visit Latvia for a limited period of time. This category of visa caters for people wishing to visit Latvia
                                                                        with purpose of participation in Scientific, Cultural or Sport event.
Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
Jurisdiction to apply for Latvian visa
There is no restrictions on the Latvian visas jurisdiction. Prospective applicants are free to apply for Latvian visas from any of the Visa Application centres accross Turkey and collect
                                                                        processed passports from the same.
In addition, all applicants, including applicants under the age of 6 and/or applicants with VIS, must come to the office.

visa_types.overview:
The Embassy of The Republic of Latvia in Turkey accepts long stay visa applications of residents of the Republic of Turkey. 
SHORT TERM (C VISA) Only Turkish citizens and Turkish residence card holders
NATIONAL VISA / LONG TERM (D VISA) Citizens of Turkey, Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Iraq, Iran, Kosovo, North Macedonia, Serbia, Syria
The short-term or Schengen visa application can be submitted 6 months before the planned travel.
The long-term of National visa application can be submitted 3 months before the planned travel.
Minors till age 12 are exempted from visa fee.

SHORT TERM (C VISA) Only Turkish citizens and Turkish residence card holders
NATIONAL VISA / LONG TERM (D VISA) Citizens of Turkey, Albania, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Iraq, Iran, Kosovo, North Macedonia, Serbia, Syria
The short-term or Schengen visa application can be submitted 6 months before the planned travel.
The long-term of National visa application can be submitted 3 months before the planned travel.
Minors till age 12 are exempted from visa fee.
